prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约972名、800名、862名、727名、830名，整体波动区间约727–972名，近5年呈窄幅震荡格局，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约830名，较2024年（727名）后移约103名，反映当年竞争略有缓和；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划：2021–2024年均为35人，2025年增至38人，2026年（依据招生计划文件）进一步扩招至46人，较2025年增加8人（+21.1%），为近年最大扩招幅度，显著增加录取机会，对位次有下拉作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国科学技术大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续稳居第7名，属全国顶尖C9联盟成员，理工科实力与声誉处于国内第一梯队；2025年高考周期内声誉评价偏正面（李政道先生逝世引发对其少年班贡献的广泛纪念）；抖音学校热度总排名第12位，评价为"高热"，短视频曝光量高；2026年高考周期内出现1条偏负面信号（教授贪污案），但影响有限；近年无投档断档或暴跌记录，录取稳定性强；第五轮学科评估中，A+学科8个（数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程），A学科3个（材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、工商管理、管理科学与工程），A-学科8个，共19个A-及以上学科，基础理学与前沿工学实力极为突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、数学/统计等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，人工智能方向谨慎观望但关注度高；江苏省2026年高考总报名人数约52.1万人，较2025年（约35.8万人）大幅增长约45.6%，物理类考生估算约38万人，竞争环境明显加剧；该校位于安徽省合肥市，毗邻江苏省，对江苏考生有较强地域吸引力；2025年在江苏招生38人，占该校全国招生计划一定比例，属省外招生重点省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次830名、2026年大幅扩招21.1%（下拉位次）、江苏省考生总数大幅增长约46%（上推位次）、专业热度高与学校声誉正面（上推位次）等多重因素，扩招的宽松效应与考生竞争加剧的收紧效应相互对冲，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约965名，区间855–1075名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（科技英才班）
- 理科试验班类（数学类华罗庚数学科技英才班、物理学类严济慈物理科技英才班）
- 量子信息科学（未来技术学院）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 物理学类（物理学、应用物理学、天文学等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术）
- 工科试验班（计算机类华夏计算机科技英才班、电子信息类信息科技英才班等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 理科试验班类（统计学、金融学、大数据管理与应用、商业人工智能）
- 网络空间安全（含王小谟网络空间科技英才班）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、自动化，信息科技方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（机器人工程、理论与应用力学、机械设计制造及其自动化等）
- 化学类（化学）
- 空间科学与技术（含赵九章现代地球和空间科技英才班）
- 理科试验班类（化学类卢嘉锡化学科技英才班、生物科学类贝时璋生命科技英才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约965名（区间855–1075名），建议位次在区间下限855名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（人工智能、数学类、计算机类等科技英才班）；位次在区间中段900–1000名的考生以二档专业为主、一档专业为辅；位次在区间上限1075名附近的考生以三档专业保底为主，兼顾二档中热度适中的专业。该校基础理学与前沿工学实力均为国内顶尖，建议优先选择与A+学科对应的专业方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 972, 800, 862, 727, and 830, with an overall fluctuation range of about 727–972. In the past five years, it has shown a narrow-range oscillating pattern with no obvious unilateral trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 830, which is about 103 places lower than 2024 (727), reflecting a slight easing of competition that year. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Jiangsu Province: 35 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 38 in 2025, and further expanded to 46 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), an increase of 8 students (+21.1%) compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly increasing admission opportunities and exerting a downward pull on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It has consistently ranked 7th in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top-tier C9 League in China, with its strength and reputation in science and engineering in the domestic first echelon. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was relatively positive (the death of Mr. Tsung-Dao Lee sparked widespread commemoration of his contributions to the university's Special Class for the Gifted Young). On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranking is 12th, rated as "high heat" with high short video exposure. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, one slightly negative signal emerged (a professor corruption case), but its impact was limited. In recent years, there have been no records of admission cut-off drops or crashes, indicating strong admission stability. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 8 A+ disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering), 3 A disciplines (Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering), and 8 A- disciplines, totaling 19 disciplines at A- or above. Its basic sciences and cutting-edge engineering strengths are extremely prominent, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Mathematics/Statistics continue to be highly popular and recommended, while the Artificial Intelligence direction is cautiously observed but attracts high attention. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.6% compared to 2025 (about 358,000). The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 380,000, indicating a markedly intensified competitive environment. The university is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, adjacent to Jiangsu Province, and has strong regional appeal to Jiangsu examinees. In 2025, it enrolled 38 students in Jiangsu, accounting for a certain proportion of the university's national enrollment plan, making it one of the key provinces for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 830, the significant 21.1% enrollment expansion in 2026 (downward pull on rankings), the substantial increase of about 46% in the total number of examinees in Jiangsu Province (upward push on rankings), high major popularity, and positive university reputation (upward push on rankings), the easing effect of expansion and the tightening effect of increased competition offset each other. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly lower than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 965, with a range of 855–1075.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Artificial Intelligence (Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics: Hua Luogeng Mathematics Science and Technology Elite Class, Physics: Yan Jici Physics Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Quantum Information Science (School of Future Technology)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Physics (Physics, Applied Physics, Astronomy, etc.)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer Science: Huaxia Computer Science and Technology Elite Class, Electronic Information: Information Science and Technology Elite Class, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Science Experimental Class (Statistics, Finance, Big Data Management and Application, Business Artificial Intelligence)
- Cyberspace Security (including Wang Xiaomo Cyberspace Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Automation, Information Technology direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics Engineering, Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, etc.)
- Chemistry (Chemistry)
- Space Science and Technology (including Zhao Jiuzhang Modern Earth and Space Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry: Lu Jiaxi Chemistry Science and Technology Elite Class, Biological Sciences: Bei Shizhang Life Science and Technology Elite Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 965 (range 855–1075). It is recommended that examinees with rankings within the lower limit of 855 or below focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Mathematics, Computer Science, etc., in elite classes). Examinees with rankings in the mid-range of 900–1000 should prioritize Tier 2 majors supplemented by Tier 1 majors. Examinees with rankings near the upper limit of 1075 should mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering moderately popular Tier 2 majors. The university's basic sciences and cutting-edge engineering strengths are both top-tier in China, so it is recommended to prioritize majors corresponding to A+ disciplines.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
